session_host_client_info_t(3) Library Functions Manual session_host_client_info_t(3)

NAME

session_host_client_info_t - Client information structure.

SYNOPSIS

#include <src/common/session/host.h>

Data Fields


uint32_t client_id
Unique client identifier. char ip_address [64]
Client IP address. int port
Client port. bool video_active
Client is currently streaming video. bool audio_active
Client is currently streaming audio. uint64_t connected_at
Connection timestamp (Unix time).

Detailed Description

Client information structure.

Contains basic information about a connected client.
